description: Kafka Server Monitoring Dashboard using OpenTelemetry Kafka Metrics Receiver. Tracks broker health, topic metrics, partition status, and consumer group lag.
title: Kafka Server Monitoring

widgets.description: Total number of brokers in the Kafka cluster
widgets.title: Number of Brokers

widgets.description: Total number of topics in the Kafka cluster
widgets.title: Number of Topics

widgets.description: Total number of partitions across all topics
widgets.title: Total Partitions

widgets.description: Number of distinct consumer groups tracked
widgets.title: Consumer Groups

widgets.description: Number of partitions per Kafka topic
widgets.title: Partitions per Topic (top 20)

widgets.description: Total replicas for each topic across all partitions
widgets.title: Replicas per Topic (top 20)

widgets.description: Current offset (log-end offset) for each partition — shows how many messages have been produced
widgets.title: Partition Current Offset (top 20)

widgets.description: Oldest offset (log-start offset) for each partition — shows retention boundary
widgets.title: Partition Oldest Offset (top 20)

widgets.description: Number of in-sync replicas per partition — healthy when equal to replication factor
widgets.title: In-Sync Replicas per Partition (top 20)

widgets.description: Whether partition has an elected leader (1 = has leader, 0 = no leader / under election)
widgets.title: Partition Leader Election Status (top 20)

widgets.description: Per-partition consumer lag — number of messages not yet consumed. High values indicate slow consumers.
widgets.title: Consumer Group Lag per Partition (top 20)

widgets.description: Total consumer lag per group summed across all partitions and topics
widgets.title: Total Consumer Group Lag (top 20 groups)

widgets.description: Current consumer group offset per partition — shows progress through the topic
widgets.title: Consumer Group Offset per Partition (top 20)

widgets.description: Number of members in each consumer group
widgets.title: Consumer Group Members (top 20)
